name: mikado-skills
description: Mikado Method skill suite for Claude Code. Turns large, scary refactors into discoverable prerequisite graphs and small, reversible commits.

plugins.name: mikado
plugins.description: Three composable skills (mikado, mikado-loop, mikado-mr) that implement the Mikado Method for AI agents. Use mikado to start a goal, mikado-loop to drive leaves with /loop, mikado-mr to prep the merge or pull request (forge-aware: GitHub via gh, GitLab via glab).
